articles.author: Jacqueline Howard, Tami Luhby
articles.title: The task force that shapes America’s preventive care has not met in a year - CNN
articles.description: There’s growing concern that the US Department of Health and Human Services is abandoning the US Preventive Services Task Force – or pushing it into “quiet paralysis.”
articles.content:
An independent panel of medical experts that shapes preventive care for patients in the United States will not hold its regular meeting this month, marking one year since its members last gathered.

articles.author: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
articles.title: GLP-1s may increase risk of osteoporosis and gout, new research finds - NBC News
articles.description: GLP-1 drugs — including Ozempic and Wegovy — may be tied to a slightly higher risk of osteoporosis and gout, according to research presented Monday at the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons’ annual meeting.Dr.
